data.body: STORY A a3d7 committed 8628d22a4 (author Joe Oakhart <joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com>, rebar-ticket + Change-Id + DCO all correct) and PUSHED to Gerrit as change 699 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/699). Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified votes. Note: commit needed PATH=.venv/bin prepended (pre-commit hook's make typecheck needs mypy on PATH).
